mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.customer_name, c.level, DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), MAX(o.order_date)) as recency, COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) as frequency, SUM(o.total_amount) as monetary, CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), MAX(o.order_date)) <= 30 THEN '活跃' WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), MAX(o.order_date)) <= 90 THEN '一般' ELSE '沉睡' END as customerStatus FROM crm_customer c LEFT JOIN crm_order o ON c.id = o.customer_id AND o.deleted = 0 WHERE c.deleted = 0 GROUP BY c.id, c.customer_name, c.level HAVING frequency > 0 ORDER BY monetary DESC

SELECT p.id as productId, p.product_name as productName, p.product_code as productCode, pc.category_name as categoryName, SUM(oi.quantity) as totalQuantity, SUM(oi.total_amount) as totalAmount, COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) as orderCount, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) as customerCount FROM crm_order_item oi INNER JOIN crm_order o ON oi.order_id = o.id INNER JOIN crm_product p ON oi.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN crm_product_category pc ON p.category_id = pc.id WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND oi.deleted = 0 AND o.status != 'cancelled' AND o.order_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY p.id, p.product_name, p.product_code, pc.category_name ORDER BY totalQuantity DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT c.country as countryCode, CASE c.country WHEN 'US' THEN '北美洲' WHEN 'CA' THEN '北美洲' WHEN 'DE' THEN '欧洲' WHEN 'GB' THEN '欧洲' WHEN 'FR' THEN '欧洲' WHEN 'AU' THEN '大洋洲' WHEN 'JP' THEN '亚洲' WHEN 'CN' THEN '亚洲' ELSE '其他' END as region, COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) as customerCount, COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) as orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) as totalSales, COALESCE(AVG(o.total_amount), 0) as avgOrderValue FROM crm_customer c LEFT JOIN crm_order o ON c.id = o.customer_id AND o.deleted = 0 AND o.order_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} WHERE c.deleted = 0 GROUP BY c.country ORDER BY totalSales DESC
